blocks.body: Past Simple: Time Expressions — yesterday, last night, ago, in 2022, and other past markers.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"Words like yesterday, last night, last week, ago, in 2022 often point to Past Simple.","rules":[{"label":"Yesterday / Last ...","color":"emerald","text":"These expressions show finished past time.","example":"She called me yesterday. / We visited them last weekend."},{"label":"Ago","color":"blue","text":"Ago shows how long before now something happened.","example":"I saw him two days ago."},{"label":"In + year","color":"amber","text":"A year or a specific finished past period also often goes with Past Simple.","example":"They moved here in 2021."}]}

{"title":"1. Useful time expressions","intro":"Start with the most common past-time markers.","items":[{"label":"Yesterday","title":"yesterday / yesterday morning","subtitle":"I stayed at home yesterday. / She called yesterday morning."},{"label":"Last ...","title":"last night / last week / last year","subtitle":"We met last night. / He worked a lot last week."},{"label":"Ago","title":"two days ago / a month ago","subtitle":"They arrived two days ago."},{"label":"In + year","title":"in 2020 / in May","subtitle":"She moved to Warsaw in 2020."}]}

{"title":"2. How these words work","sections":[{"label":"Finished time","color":"emerald","description":"These expressions show that the time is finished, so Past Simple is often needed.","examples":[{"en":"I visited my cousin yesterday.","ua":"A finished time in the past."},{"en":"We watched a film last night.","ua":"A finished event last night."}]},{"label":"Position in the sentence","color":"blue","description":"A time expression often goes at the end of the sentence, but it can also go at the beginning.","examples":[{"en":"She called me yesterday. / Yesterday she called me.","ua":"Both positions are possible."},{"en":"Last week we stayed at home.","ua":"The expression can stand at the beginning too."}]},{"label":"Choosing the tense","color":"amber","description":"If the time is finished, Past Simple often sounds more natural than Present Simple or Present Continuous.","examples":[{"en":"He worked there in 2021.","ua":"A finished period in the past."},{"en":"They arrived two hours ago.","ua":"Ago also points to Past Simple."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Common combinations","intro":"See how time expressions work with Past Simple.","rows":[{"en":"I called her yesterday.","ua":"a finished action yesterday","note":"yesterday"},{"en":"We stayed home last weekend.","ua":"a finished past period","note":"last weekend"},{"en":"She saw him two days ago.","ua":"a past distance from now","note":"ago"},{"en":"They moved here in 2021.","ua":"a specific past year","note":"in + year"}],"warning":"Words like every day or now usually go with other tenses, not Past Simple."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using V1 with yesterday.","wrong":"❌ I go there yesterday.","right":"✅ I went there yesterday."},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Using V2 after didn't with a time expression.","wrong":"❌ She didn't saw him last night.","right":"✅ She didn't see him last night."},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Not changing the verb with ago.","wrong":"❌ We visit them two days ago.","right":"✅ We visited them two days ago."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["yesterday, last..., ago, and in 2021 often lead to Past Simple.","These expressions show finished past time.","A time expression often stands at the end of the sentence, but it can also stand at the beginning.","If the time is already finished, Past Simple often sounds natural."]}
